mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review (title, content, address, user_id, point, review_status) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{address}, #{userId}, #{point}, 'ACTIVE')

INSERT INTO review_attribute (review_id, type, content) VALUES
(#{reviewId}, #{type}, #{item})
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.title, r.content, r.address, r.user_id, r.point, r.review_status, r.created_at, r.updated_at, u.login_id FROM review r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE review_status = 'ACTIVE' AND r.id = #{id}

SELECT r.id, r.title, r.content, r.address, r.user_id, u.login_id AS loginId, r.point, r.review_status, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM review r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.review_status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT 4
mapper.update: UPDATE review SET review_status = #{status} WHERE id = #{reviewId}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(id) FROM review
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
